summary.title: Example: Many Slides
summary.subtitle: Platform Team — Jan 5 – Mar 27, 2026
highlights: Auth overhaul shipped — OAuth2 PKCE live in production
GraphQL migration complete across all core entities
CI/CD pipeline 58% faster with parallelized test suites
Search feature launched to 100% of users
Design system migration at 60% — on track for Q2 completion

themes.title: Auth Overhaul
themes.description: OAuth2 PKCE login, refresh token rotation, session management

items.text: Migrated login flow to OAuth2 PKCE
Implemented refresh token rotation
Deprecated legacy session cookie auth
Token invalidation race condition on Safari (resolved)
Add SSO support for enterprise customers in Q2

themes.title: GraphQL Migration
themes.description: REST-to-GraphQL migration complete for all 12 core endpoints

items.text: Migrated 12 core REST endpoints to GraphQL resolvers
Added DataLoader for N+1 query prevention
Published schema to internal developer portal
Subscription support delayed — WebSocket infra not ready
Deprecate legacy REST endpoints over Q2

themes.title: Search Feature
themes.description: Elasticsearch-backed full-text search with faceting, launched to 100%

items.text: Elasticsearch cluster provisioned and indexed (148k products)
Full-text and faceted search API live
Search UI with autocomplete and highlights rolled out to 100%
Index rebuild time reduced from 40min to 4min
Personalized ranking based on user history in Q2

themes.title: Performance Optimization
themes.description: Bundle size -34%, LCP -44%, virtual scrolling for large datasets

items.text: Lazy-loaded 12 route chunks — initial bundle down 34%
Virtual scrolling on dashboard table (10k+ rows)
LCP improved from 3.2s to 1.8s
SSR hydration mismatch with React.lazy (workaround in place)
Add performance budget to CI pipeline

themes.title: Observability & Monitoring
themes.description: CloudWatch + Datadog APM across all services, PagerDuty alerting live

items.text: CloudWatch dashboards for all Lambda functions
Datadog APM integrated across API services
PagerDuty alerts for P95 latency and error rate thresholds
Add custom business metrics (conversion rate, checkout funnel)

themes.title: API Rate Limiting
themes.description: Sliding window rate limiter with Redis, production rollout complete

items.text: Sliding window rate limiter with Redis-backed distributed counter
Load tested at 5x expected peak traffic
Production rollout complete with gradual ramp
Redis connection pool exhaustion under 10min sustained load (resolved)
Rate limit dashboard in admin panel

themes.title: Design System Migration
themes.description: 40 of 67 components migrated, Storybook coverage at 100%

items.text: 40 of 67 components migrated to new design system
Storybook stories for all migrated components
Shared component types extracted to atlas-shared
Legacy CSS specificity conflicts in 8 components
Complete remaining 27 components in Q2

themes.title: CI/CD Pipeline
themes.description: Build time cut from 12min to 5min, cache hit rate 94%

items.text: Parallelized test suites across 4 runners
Artifact caching for node_modules and build output
Average build time: 12min → 5min
Flaky e2e tests on Windows runners (3 tests, tracked)
Preview environments for PRs in Q2

themes.title: Onboarding Redesign
themes.description: New 3-step flow live — +22% completion rate, time-to-complete halved

items.text: New 3-step onboarding flow rolled out to 100% of users
Completion rate: 52% → 74%
Time to complete: 7.8min → 3.2min
Step 2 drop-off at 18% — simplified profile setup shipped
Personalized onboarding path based on user role

themes.title: Bug Bash & Tech Debt
themes.description: 34 bugs resolved, backlog at lowest point in 6 months

items.text: Resolved 34 open bugs across all repos
Fixed 8 critical customer-reported issues
Cleared tech debt items older than 6 months
12 bugs deferred — require larger refactors
Quarterly bug bashes scheduled going forward

themes.title: Infrastructure Upgrades
themes.description: Node 20 LTS, Postgres 16, Redis 7.2 — all services updated

items.text: All services upgraded to Node 20 LTS
Postgres upgraded from 14 to 16 with zero downtime migration
Redis upgraded to 7.2 — ACL-based auth enabled
One legacy service incompatible with Node 20 — pinned until Q2
Migrate legacy service to Node 20 in Q2

themes.title: Team & Process
themes.description: New RFC process adopted, on-call rotation formalized, retro action rate up

items.text: RFC process adopted — 4 RFCs published this quarter
On-call rotation formalized with runbooks for all alerts
Retro action item close rate improved from 40% to 75%
Engineering blog post on GraphQL migration approach
